cycle.failed: Task could not be added to the cycle. Please try again.
cycle.success: {count, plural, one {Task} other {Tasks}} added to the cycle successfully.
cycle.loading: Adding {count, plural, one {task} other {tasks}} to the cycle

cycle.success: Task removed from the cycle successfully.
cycle.failed: Task could not be removed from the cycle. Please try again.

module.success: Task removed from the module successfully.
module.failed: Task could not be removed from the module. Please try again.

create.error: Comment creation failed. Please try again later.

update.error: Comment update failed. Please try again later.

remove.error: Comment remove failed. Please try again later.

upload.error: Asset upload failed. Please try again later.

copy_link.error: Error copying comment link. Please try again later.

issue_detail.title: Task does not exist
issue_detail.description: The task you are looking for does not exist, has been archived, or has been deleted.

archive.description: Only completed or canceled tasks can be archived
archive.label: Archive Task
archive.confirm_message: Are you sure you want to archive the task? All your archived tasks can be restored later.

success.label: Archive success
success.message: Your archives can be found in project archives.

failed.message: Task could not be archived. Please try again.

success.title: Restore success
success.message: Your task can be found in project tasks.

failed.message: Task could not be restored. Please try again.

select.error: Please select at least one task

modal.title: Make a copy to another project
modal.description1: This creates a copy of the task.
modal.description2: All property data will be removed while duplicating.

pages.no_description: This is an empty page. Why don't you write something inside and see it show up here like this placeholder

sub_list_filters.title: You don't have sub-tasks that match the filters you've applied.
sub_list_filters.description: To see all sub-tasks, clear all applied filters.

list_filters.title: You don't have tasks that match the filters you've applied.
list_filters.description: To see all tasks, clear all applied filters.

general.title: No comments yet
general.description: Comments can be used as a discussion and follow-up space for the tasks

invalid_archive_state_group.title: Unable to archive tasks
invalid_archive_state_group.message: Only tasks belonging to Completed or Canceled state groups can be archived.

invalid_issue_start_date.title: Unable to update tasks
invalid_issue_start_date.message: Start date selected succeeds the due date for some tasks. Ensure start date to be before the due date.

invalid_issue_target_date.title: Unable to update tasks
invalid_issue_target_date.message: Due date selected precedes the start date for some tasks. Ensure due date to be after the start date.

invalid_state_transition.title: Unable to update tasks
invalid_state_transition.message: State change is not allowed for some tasks. Ensure the state change is allowed.

settings.heading: Recurring tasks
settings.description: Set your repeatable work once, and we’ll take care of the repeats. You’ll see everything right here when it’s time.

create_button.label: Create recurring task
create_button.no_permission: Contact your project admin to create recurring tasks

upgrade.title: Your work, on autopilot
upgrade.description: Set it once. We’ll bring it back when it’s due. Upgrade to Business to make recurring work feel effortless.

success.title: Recurring task created
success.message: {name}, the recurring task, is now available for your workspace.

error.title: We couldn't create that recurring task this time.
error.message: Try saving your details again or copy them over to a new recurring task, preferably in another tab.

error.title: We couldn't save changes to this recurring task.
error.message: Try saving your details again or come back to this recurring task later. If there's trouble still, reach out to us.

success.title: Recurring task deleted
success.message: {name}, the recurring task, has now been deleted from your workspace.

error.title: We couldn't delete that recurring task this.
error.message: Try deleting it again or come back to it later. If you can't delete it then, reach out to us.

description.prefix: Are you sure you want to delete recurring task-
description.suffix: ? All of the data related to the recurring task will be permanently removed. This action cannot be undone.
